title: OptiShade
description: OptiShade enhances Minecraft with improved performance and shader support for better lighting and visuals. Enjoy a smoother, more beautiful vanilla experience.
body:
## Optishade Modpack!
Join Us In The Discord!
[Discord](https://discord.gg/BScnncd5Ca)

### Description

Optishade is a meticulously crafted Minecraft modpack designed to enhance your vanilla gameplay experience with optimal performance, stunning visuals, and extensive shader support. This modpack is perfect for players who seek to maintain the core essence of Minecraft while enjoying smoother gameplay and breathtaking scenery.

# Why Download Optishade?

Optishade is the ideal modpack for players who want to keep the vanilla Minecraft experience intact while benefiting from modern enhancements. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the game, Optishade provides a seamless blend of performance, aesthetics, and functionality. Enhance your Minecraft world without compromising its original spirit.

Discover the beauty of Minecraft with Optishade and transform your gameplay into a visually captivating adventure.

# Key Features

- **Optimized Performance:**  
  Experience significant improvements in game performance with enhanced frame rates and reduced lag. Optishade utilizes various optimization mods to ensure your game runs smoothly, even on lower-end systems.

- **Vanilla Enhancements:**  
  Maintain the pure Minecraft experience with slight enhancements that preserve the game’s original charm. Enjoy improved textures, refined lighting, and subtle tweaks that make the world more immersive.

- **Shader Pack Support:**  
  Optishade comes with built-in support for popular shader packs, allowing you to easily integrate stunning visual effects such as dynamic shadows, realistic water reflections, and beautiful skyboxes. Customize your visuals to your liking and take your Minecraft world to the next level.

- **Terralith Integration:**  
  Transform your world with the Terralith mod, which overhauls terrain generation and introduces a plethora of new biomes, above-ground structures, and even underground structures. Explore breathtaking landscapes and discover unique environments that breathe new life into your Minecraft experience.

- **User-Friendly Configuration:**  
  Easy-to-use configuration options ensure that you can tailor the modpack to suit your preferences and system capabilities. Adjust settings for performance or visual quality with simple, intuitive controls.


# Shaders and Resource Packs included:
* [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/r5.2.1)
* [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound/version/r5.2.1)
* [Bloop Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bloop-shaders/version/1.1.0)
* [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders/version/8.2.09)
* [Ebin Resurrected](https://modrinth.com/shader/ebin-resurrected/version/beta-1.11.2)
* [Alacrity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alacrity/version/27)
